title: VS Code Copilot local MCP registration, unique identity, and protocol handshake
command: cargo test -p feedback-mcp -p session-mcp -p peek-mcp -p rule-mcp -p audit-mcp -p compact-terminal-mcp; build release binaries; launch each binary and require serverInfo.name == package name plus successful tools/list
detail: Validates schema discovery, package availability, six unique stdio initialize identities, and tool enumeration. feedback-mcp must initialize as feedback-mcp and expose feedback_ingest, feedback_inbox, feedback_query, feedback_mine, and feedback_summary.
